'''Nib Maroon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]].

==Biography==
Maroon was a singer who traveled with a group of itinerant musicians in her early career, but later she was hired by [[Rava Teb'lya]] to work at the [[Rose Nebula]]. She worked at the Nebula as a singer and a member of the nebula's undercover security team.<ref name="UA" />
